title: What to Wear to the Office for a Chic Minimal Look (Black Top & Trousers Outfit Idea)
description:
Looking for a chic and minimal office outfit that feels both modern and effortless? This elegant workwear look features a fitted black top paired with high-waisted tailored trousers, creating a clean, structured silhouette that is perfect for everyday office style.

The darker top adds contrast and instantly elevates the outfit, while the neutral-toned trousers keep it professional and timeless. Styled with subtle accessories like a watch and bracelet, this look is ideal for anyone who loves minimalist fashion, clean girl aesthetic, or classy work outfits.

Perfect for:
• Office outfits
• Business casual looks
• Smart minimal fashion
• Everyday elegant style

Save this pin for your next work outfit inspiration and upgrade your wardrobe with this sleek, modern combination.
